summary: Frontend-only validation of /app/report (Before/After Report). All UI/flow requirements pass. Login as admin, navigate via sidebar item 'Before/After Report' (present), page renders with report-page, report-step-1/2/3, report-card. Capture BEFORE -> POST /api/report/snapshot 200; BEFORE column shows health_score=95, bench_overall=650, bufferbloat_ms='--', fps_avg='--' (expected per note). Capture AFTER -> POST /api/report/snapshot 200; both columns populated, all 4 metric rows visible with Change cell (unchanged since data identical, expected). Export PNG triggered download 'frameforge-report.png' and success toast 'Report exported!' (see screenshot). Reset -> DELETE /api/report 200; all cells return to '--'. Verified GET /api/report returns {before:null, after:null, deltas:{}, updated_at:null}. Admin data cleaned as required.

issues: html-to-image logs two console SecurityError warnings about Google Fonts cssRules (CORS on fonts.googleapis.com). Non-fatal: PNG still downloads and toast shows. Consider adding fontEmbedCSS='' or skipFonts:true option to suppress noise, or self-host the font.

action_items: OPTIONAL: pass {skipFonts:true} (or preload embedFonts) to toPng in Report.jsx exportPng to remove non-fatal Google Fonts CSSRules SecurityError console warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: Report.jsx exportPng catch block is silent (swallows non-error rejects). Currently OK because toPng falls through the CSS warnings and still resolves, but if it ever throws you'd only see generic 'Errore' toast without a log. Consider console.error(e) inside catch for easier debugging.
seed_data_creation: None. Admin report deleted at end of run (cleanup verified via GET /api/report).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Report page UI + integration verified end-to-end on preview URL. Only cosmetic console warning from html-to-image over Google Fonts remains. All data-testids present as spec'd.
